---
title: "Two years of School Life by Madame de Pressensé. Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Two years of School Life by Madame de Pressensé. Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London: Frederick Warne and Co., Bedford Street, Covent Garden.

### Notes

A translation of Élise Françoise de Pressensé, <i>Deux ans au lycée</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
